(4) **post-batch-09**: 强制 drift cal (§C.1 cadence, batch 07-09 cumulative ~680 atoms 过阈值). (5) Rule A slot #18 候选: pr-review-toolkit:pr-test-analyzer (未烧, 带 Write). (6) findings 累 20: O-P1-01..20; Rule D 烧 17; (7) session 此处 wrap-up 因 ctx 加 repair cycles 接近 50% threshold; 本 session 最终 state: 80 页 / 2286 atoms / 8 batches / 1 dropout failure / 3 repair cycles (E + H + H); root pdf_atoms.jsonl 2286 clean post-repair; (8) pending tasks: 无阻塞, batch 09 开跑立即派; 下 session 起步读本 recovery_hint + 最新 P1_batch_08_report.md + 新添 findings O-P1-18/19/20 详情. (2) 当前累 60 页 / 1838 atoms / 6 batches done / attempt 1 failures 1 (attempt 2 0); (3) Gate 状态: Rule A per-batch 06 PASS 90% (9/10, 1 FAIL = F-B06-RA-1 p.54 a002 TABLE_ROW row-number-vs-sibling_index 混淆 inline 修, 已 ack F-B06-RA-1 挂 O-P1-11 LOW); drift cal p.60 17.6% strict FAIL (non-reproducibility 原因 unique: writer 06b 页号 misattribution + CO spec table under-extract; 非 O-P1-09 sparse-cell 同类, 记 O-P1-12 MEDIUM). (4) **下一步 batch 07**: writer=oh-my-claudecode:executor (2-type alternation: batch 06b=writer → 07=executor) × SDTMIG v3.4 p.61-70, output evidence/checkpoints/pdf_atoms_batch_07.jsonl, prompt=P0_writer_pdf_v1.2+batch07_4digit_fix+anti-dropout+parent_section-brackets (继承 batch 06a/b 成功经验); 推荐 slot #16 = **pr-review-toolkit:silent-failure-hunter** (带 Write, 原 review 家族, 适合 slot 轮换); (6) **下次 drift cal**: 待 batch 07-09 再累 300+ atoms 触发 §C.1 第 3 次; 建议 drift 第 3 次 target = spec table dense page (p.67+ 测 CO/CM/DD 等域 spec 表) 验 O-P1-12 generalizability; (7) **session budget 实测**: batch 06 wall=attempt 1 9.4min (dropout) + parallel 06a 5.6min / 06b 3.5min + drift cal 1min + Rule A 2.2min + inline repair 2min + paperwork ~4min = ~20min 含失败 retry; (8) **O-P1-11 新 LOW**: F-B06-RA-1 TABLE_ROW PDF-literal Row 值 vs sibling_index 混淆, inline 修 1 原子, 若 batch 07-08 再出则升 MEDIUM 并 v1.3 prompt 加 rule 'TABLE_ROW verbatim 必含 PDF-literal Row 列值, 不得用 sibling_index 替换'; (9) **O-P1-12 新 MEDIUM**: 06b writer 页号 misattribution (12 原子 §4.5.9 attributed p.60 实为 p.59) + CO spec table under-extract (11 TABLE_ROW 漏). 建议 v1.3 prompt 加规则: (a) 读 1 页后必检 HEADING 章节号与页底页码 consistency cross-check; (b) spec table 所有行必抽, 不允许 'ended early' 跳过剩余行; (10) findings 累 12: O-P1-01..12; (11) Rule D roster 烧 15/16 (新增 oh-my-claudecode:code-simplifier slot #15 作 Rule A reviewer); 余 scientist/architect (no Write, 需主 session 代写产 output) / Plan (同) / **未烧带 Write**: pr-review-toolkit 家族 {silent-failure-hunter/comment-analyzer/pr-test-analyzer/code-simplifier/type-design-analyzer} + vercel 家族, 可扩 roster 超 16 (原 16 估算值, 不是硬上限); (12) writer_pool_hard 仍 2-type only (executor+writer), writer_banned unchanged; tiebreaker=general-purpose (若 drift <80% 3-way 触发); (13) **失败归档 Rule B**: evidence/failures/P1_batch_06_attempt_1_writer_dropout.jsonl + .md (27 atoms dropout) permanent retained; batches_log.notes: Attempt 1 (single writer × 10 pages) DROPOUT: 27 atoms only (9% expected), Rule B archived. Attempt 2 Option C: 06a executor × p.51-55 = 156 atoms clean + 06b writer × p.56-60 = 105 atoms (subsequently found 2 structural bugs, Option E inline repair applied). Bug 1: 12 §4.5.9 atoms misattributed page=60 → relocated page=59. Bug 2: 06b under-extracted CO spec table on p.60 (2 TABLE_ROWs vs actual 13) → replaced with drift_cal executor's 24 atoms. F-B06-RA-1 TABLE_ROW verbatim fix: p.54 a002 '5 | INTP' → '6 | INTP'. Final: 263 atoms, 0 dup, 9/9 atom_type, pre 1575 + 263 = 1838. Rule D 新烧: code-simplifier slot #15.

writers: oh-my-claudecode:writer (07b p.66-70) 117 atoms post fix 113 atoms
batches_log.notes: Option C parallel default + Option H inline repair: 07a clean 115 atoms; 07b 117→113 atoms post dedup + type fixes. Findings: 8 atoms lettered-list pattern (a/b/c/d) misclassified as HEADING + 4 duplicated from p.67 onto p.66 + F-B07-RA-3 case drift. F-B07-RA-2 was reviewer FALSE POSITIVE. Rule D slot #16 = silent-failure-hunter.

Option C parallel on attempt 1 ok (0 dropout per O-P1-13 default). **MAJOR SYSTEMIC ISSUE discovered post-merge via Rule A + main-session PDF-verified cross-check**: 182/220 atoms (83%) had WRONG parent_section section numbering. (1) 08a 130 atoms on p.71-75 tagged '§5.1 [Demographics (DM)]' — but PDF verified §5.1=CO / §5.2=DM / §5.3=SE, so should be '§5.2 [Demographics (DM)]'. Writer confused §5.1 with §5.2 systematically. (2) 08b 52 atoms on p.76-78 tagged '§5.2 [CRF Metadata]' — 'CRF Metadata' is a local sub-table label NOT a section title; writer misread local heading as section title. (3) 08b 38 atoms on p.79-80 tagged '§5.3 [Subject Elements]' = correct. Rule A reviewer (slot #17 comment-analyzer) flagged only 3/10 sample atoms of type (2), MISSED all 130 type (1) errors, AND reviewer's OWN section numbering was INVERTED (reviewer claimed '§5.2 is CO' which is factually wrong — §5.2 is DM). Plus 2 non-systemic findings: F-B08-RA-5 verbatim paraphrase on p.79 a008 (SE dataset sentence: 'evaluate...in the context of' should be 'relate...to' per PDF literal), F-B08-RA-6 p.80 a008 SEENDY verbatim missing Core column 'Perm'. Option H bulk repair: 130 §5.1→§5.2 + 52 §5.2[CRF Metadata]→§5.2[DM] + 2 verbatim fixes. Final: 220 atoms clean (post-repair: 182 §5.2 DM + 38 §5.3 SE). Pre 2066 + 220 = 2286. 8b HEADING fields backfill (16 atoms) also applied pre-repair. Rule D 新烧: comment-analyzer slot #17.

v1.2 writer prompt banlist 禁 feature-dev:code-explorer vs P1 sub-plan §0/§B.2 允许之, 文档矛盾. 用户选 X (document-specialist) 但发现 document-specialist Tools='All tools except Write, Edit' 物理无法 Write → pivot X' = 2-type alternation only (executor ↔ writer). Sub-plan §0/§B.2 已修 2026-04-24, writer_pool_hard 从 3 type 降 2 type, writer_banned 扩充含 document-specialist + architect + code-reviewer 等 no-Write-tool 类型. Drift calibration tiebreaker 候选 general-purpose (有 Write tool).

P0 PLAN §8 slot #6 把 document-specialist 列为 'Writer (多模态 PDF 读)' 是作者写作时未核对 Tools 契约的 bug (document-specialist 无 Write tool). PLAN v0.6 需正式改 roster 表 slot #6 role 从 Writer 降为 Reader-only (作 reviewer 抽检 OK, 不作 writer 用). 本 P1 已 inline 修 via sub-plan v1.0 patch.

Drift calibration p.25 2-type 67.5% < 80% threshold FAIL. 关键观察: atom_type distribution 100% identical (两 writer 在'该抽什么'完全一致), drift 集中在 13/26 TABLE_ROW 的 verbatim 字面 — 具体是 CDISC QS 示例表 (sparse empty 列) 的 pipe-分隔 cell 解析歧义. 这不是 prompt 语义 drift, 是 PDF table OCR parsing 层固有噪声. 需: (a) 派 general-purpose tiebreaker 确认 (dispatched); (b) 评估是否升 v1.3 prompt 加 TABLE_ROW sparse-cell 归一化规则; (c) 考虑 drift 阈值分层 (atom_identification ≥95% + verbatim ≥ 80% 分别打分, 而非合并一单值)

batch 04 Rule A PARTIAL (F-B04-RA-1): ig34_p0038_a017 '4.4 Actual and Relative Time Assumptions' HEADING heading_level claimed=1, 应=2 (4.x sections are level-2 under Chapter 4 = level-1). sibling_index=4 correct (4th sibling among 4.1-4.4). Non-semantic off-by-one, 不影响 atom 语义正确性但影响 P4b tree build. Batch 05 Rule A 验证 4.4.11 level=3 correct 未再现, 保持 LOW 单例.

batch 06 Rule A FAIL (F-B06-RA-1): ig34_p0054_a002 TABLE_ROW verbatim '5 | INTP | ...' 应 '6 | INTP | ...' (eg.xpt PDF 表 Row 列显示 '6', writer 误用自己 sibling_index=5 替换 PDF-literal Row 值). Inline 修已 apply. 观察期: 若 batch 07-08 再出 PDF-literal Row 与 sibling_index 混淆, 升 MEDIUM 并 v1.3 prompt 加 rule 'TABLE_ROW verbatim 必保 PDF-literal Row 列值, 不得用 sibling_index 替换'.

batch 06 attempt 2 06b writer 双 structural bugs: (a) 12 原子 §4.5.9 Baseline Values 内容 page field 标为 60, 实际内容在 PDF p.59 (writer 可能读了多页或 internal page offset). (b) Same writer 对 p.60 CO 域 spec 表 under-extract: 只写 2 TABLE_ROW 实际应 13 (STUDYID/DOMAIN/RDOMAIN/USUBJID/COSEQ/IDVAR/IDVARVAL/COREF/COVAL/COEVAL/COEVALID/CODTC/CODY). Inline 修 via Option E: relocate 12 原子 p.60→p.59 + replace p.60 22 原子 with drift_cal executor rerun 24 原子. v1.3 prompt 候选 rules: (i) 1 页读完必 cross-check HEADING 章节号 vs PDF 页码 consistency; (ii) spec table 必抽所有行不 early-terminate.

Option C parallel mini-batch (2 writers 并行) 方法论 effective: attempt 1 single-writer dropout (27 atoms) 在 attempt 2 split 2 writer × 5 页后恢复 (156 + 105 = 261 atoms, 9/9 type cover, albeit with 06b 结构性 bug 可 inline 修). Each sub-writer context ≤5 页降 dropout 概率. 建议 batch 07+ 若再出 dropout 直接上 parallel 不 retry single.
Rule A 10-atom stratified sample 本次 PASS 90% 但未覆盖 06b 结构性 bug 区间 (p.59-60), 两大 bug 由主 session PDF-read 独立发现. 方法论 reflection: 10-atom 可能 coverage 盲区 — batch 07+ 考虑增加 sample n 或 '1 atom/页' 强约束.

Lettered list item (a./b./c./d.) vs HEADING 分类歧义: batch 07 writer 把 DM Assumptions item 10 的 4 个子 item (a. RFSTDTC / b. RFXSTDTC / c. RFCSTDTC / d. RFICDTC) 分类为 HEADING level=4, 实应为 LIST_ITEM (非独立章节). Scope 8 atoms inline 修 (4 on p.66 删 + 4 on p.67 改). v1.3 prompt 候选: 加 rule '以小写字母 + 点 + 空格 (a./b./c./d.) 开头的 items 总是 LIST_ITEM, 除非明显是小节标题 (所在位置 + 标题格式断定). HEADING level=4 通常只出现在 §N.x.y.z 四级节号标题, 不是 lettered sub-items.'

Writer 07b (oh-my-claudecode:writer) DUPLICATION bug: 4 atoms 的内容 (DM Assumptions item 10 a./b./c./d. 子项) 同时写在 p.66 和 p.67, 但 PDF p.66 只显示 item 10 开始句, a./b./c./d. 的实际 lettered 子项在 p.67. 类似 batch 06 O-P1-12a (page misattribution) 但更严重 — 导致 4 个 duplicate atoms. 可能同因: writer Read multi-page or 内部 page offset confusion. Option H 删除 p.66 的 4 duplicates. v1.3 prompt 加 rule '同一 verbatim 内容 NEVER 重复在多个 page 原子上; cross-page atom_id 检查前, 先 verbatim-hash 查重; 页内 IR1: ≤1 页硬约束不光是输入约束, 也是输出内容归属约束'.
Rule A reviewer 幻觉/false positive: batch 07 reviewer (silent-failure-hunter) F-B07-RA-2 误读 atom parent_section.

Batch 08a writer (oh-my-claudecode:executor × p.71-75) SYSTEMIC §5.1/§5.2 numbering confusion: 130/130 atoms tagged '§5.1 [Demographics (DM)]' — 实际 §5.1=CO, §5.2=DM. Option H bulk 修 130 atoms. Root cause: writer 内部 section-numbering mental model 错 (把 DM 归 §5.1 而非 §5.2). v1.3 prompt 候选: 明示 '每批开头 writer 必先读 PDF p.6 TOC 确认 §N.x 章节编号, 不得基于 topic 名称 guess 章节号 — 依赖 PDF 显示的 '§X.Y TITLE' 结构字面识别'. Key insight: writer 可能读 1 页可见 'DM' topic 但 chapter header 在前页未见, 倾向于 guess 章节号而非 cross-page index.

Batch 08b writer (oh-my-claudecode:writer × p.76-78) 把局部 table label 'CRF Metadata' 误当作 §5.2 章节标题: 52/90 atoms tagged '§5.2 [CRF Metadata]'. 'CRF Metadata' 是 DM Example 6 CRF mock form 中的 local table title, 非 SDTMIG 章节标题. Option H bulk 修. v1.3 prompt 候选: 'parent_section 章节号 [TITLE] 的 TITLE 必须来自 PDF §X.Y 标题 (如 Comments (CO) / Demographics (DM) / Subject Elements (SE)), NEVER 局部 table heading / sub-label / form title'.

Rule A reviewer (comment-analyzer slot #17) 自己 section-numbering INVERTED: 报 '§5.2 is CO' 实际 §5.1=CO §5.2=DM. Reviewer 方向 correct (指出 writer 的 parent_section 错) 但 rationale factually wrong. 主 session PDF cross-check 纠正反转. 方法论: Rule D reviewer quality check 需要 ground truth 参考 (TOC read / known section map) — Reviewer prompt 建议 prepend 'SDTMIG v3.4 §5 Models for Special-purpose Domains: §5.1 Comments (CO) / §5.2 Demographics (DM) / §5.3 Subject Elements (SE) ...' 作 reviewer-side anchor.
